name: Credential Manager credentials were backed up
definition: Windows Security Event ID 5376 records Credential Manager credentials were backed up.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: Backup target path under C:\\Users\\ or a removable drive and Subject outside the account owner can expose stored credentials; correlate vaultcmd.exe or rundll32.exe.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.
detection_notes: Backup target path under C:\\Users\\ or a removable drive and Subject outside the account owner can expose stored credentials; correlate vaultcmd.exe or rundll32.exe. This is a T1555 Credentials from Password Stores signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 5376
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
